title: * Automated Documentation [P4-B]:
content:
* Automated Documentation [P4-B]:
* Generate README.md files for all logically significant directories (e.g., /src, /scripts), not for trivial ones (e.g., /assets/img).
* Domain Research & Audit [P4-C]:
* Generate the RESEARCH.md annotated bibliography.
* Audit the codebase for best practices, security, and linting.
* Triage the ingested existing issues [P1-A] against the new audit.
* Swarm Task Scaffolding [P4-D]:
* Generate a new Project board.
* Populate it with all identified tasks, including:
* Resolving test failures from [P3-B].
* Addressing conflicts from [P3-A].
* Implementing fixes from the audit [P4-C].
* Triaging existing issues [P1-A].
* Cost & Resource Analysis [P4-E]:
* Provide an estimated time, compute, and token/API cost for executing the entire task list in Phase 5.
➡️ Human Review Gate 2 (HRG-2): Swarm Approval [HRG-2]
* STOP EXECUTION.
* Present the Project board [P4-D] and the Cost Analysis [P4-E].
* Request: "Do you approve the execution of these [X] tasks with an estimated cost of [Y]? [Yes/No/Modify Task List]"
context: From document: full best practices house keeping; — chunk 4 (chunk 4/24)
